action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the 'api-gateway' deployment, including replica counts, CPU/memory usage, incoming traffic (QPS), HPA settings, and cloud-bursting status.

deployment_name.description: The name of the deployment to inspect.

action_set_definitions.name: configure_autoscaling
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) settings for the specified deployment.

min_replicas.description: The minimum number of pod replicas.

max_replicas.description: The maximum number of pod replicas.

target_cpu_utilization.description: The target CPU utilization percentage for the HPA.

action_set_definitions.name: set_cloud_bursting_policy
action_set_definitions.description: Configures whether the deployment can scale into the cloud once the local capacity of 10 replicas is reached and sets the termination priority.

allow_cloud_bursting.description: Enable or disable scaling beyond the local cluster limit.

termination_order.description: Determines which replicas are terminated first during scale-down.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_traffic_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Transitions the environment through the specific traffic volatility event: Initial (100 QPS) -> Surge (450 QPS) -> Final Baseline (50 QPS). Each call progresses the simulation to the next logical phase and returns the updated environmental metrics.

deployment_name.description: The deployment to track during the traffic transition.

state_description.deployment_name: The name of the Kubernetes deployment being managed.
state_description.current_replicas: The number of currently running and ready pods.
state_description.cpu_usage_milli: Average CPU usage per pod in millicores (m).
state_description.memory_usage_mib: Average memory usage per pod in MiB.
state_description.hpa_min_replicas: Minimum replicas allowed by the Horizontal Pod Autoscaler.
state_description.hpa_max_replicas: Maximum replicas allowed by the Horizontal Pod Autoscaler.
state_description.hpa_target_cpu_utilization: The target CPU utilization percentage for the HPA.
state_description.incoming_qps: Total incoming requests per second to the deployment.
state_description.cluster_status: General status of the deployment (e.g., Stable, Scaling, Degraded).
